text: my wife said i needed to up my style game with respect to footwear when dressed casually . i normally just wear running sneaks that i ' ve retired ( and washed ) after so many road miles . i like the look of these . i ' m normally a solid 8 1 / 2 and i ' d say they feel about 1 / 2 size larger . quality is fine for what these are . i would not run in them but that ' s not what these are meant to be . happy with purchase .
